name: Verify Everything
description: Six-gate verification: Docs → Intent → Structure → Execution → Quality → Truth. Docs first, reviewer last, nothing ships unverified.

phases.name: Documentation Truth
phases.principle: Is the documentation honest and current?

delegates.task_template: Sync agent registry, verify versions, reconcile documentation truth, and update docs/user-guide.md registry sections if needed for: ${goal}
Sync all documentation to current fleet, protocols, and registry; validate snippets; update glossary/terms for: ${goal}
verifies: code snippets are tested and current

phases.checkpoint: All documentation synced, verified, and committed
phases.failure_message: Documentation truth failed. Nothing else is trustworthy until docs are current.

phases.name: Intent Verification
phases.principle: Are we building the right thing?

delegates.task_template: Verify requirements and acceptance criteria match current product behavior; flag scope creep for: ${goal}
verifies: no intent exists without acceptance criteria

phases.checkpoint: All acceptance criteria verified and scope confirmed
phases.failure_message: Intent verification failed. Nothing else matters until this passes.

phases.name: Structural Verification

delegates.task_template: Verify architectural integrity, modularity, provider abstraction boundaries, concurrency model, and cross-platform assumptions for: ${goal}
verifies: tech debt and modularity scores acceptable

phases.checkpoint: Architectural integrity confirmed and ADRs current
phases.failure_message: Structural verification failed. Do NOT optimize, ship, or document until this passes.

phases.name: Execution Verification
phases.principle: Does it actually work fast, everywhere?

delegates.task_template: Verify performance budgets with benchmarks; validate voice/audio hot path and threading overhead for: ${goal}
Verify telemetry coverage for latency, jitter, underruns, queue depth, thread saturation, regressions for: ${goal}
Verify cross-platform build/package/runtime parity for macOS, Linux, and WSL for: ${goal}
Verify security boundaries, secrets handling, provider isolation, dependency risk for: ${goal}
Verify UI usability and a11y: keyboard-only, mouse, touch, auto light/dark, focus, contrast for: ${goal}

phases.checkpoint: All execution delegates pass with evidence
phases.failure_message: Execution verification failed. Any failure here blocks release.

phases.name: Release Quality Gates
phases.principle: Do all tests pass and quality gates hold?

delegates.task_template: Run full test strategy (unit/integration/e2e/smoke) and issue PASS/FAIL verdict for: ${goal}

phases.checkpoint: All test strategies pass with PASS verdict
phases.failure_message: Release quality gates failed. Fix tests before proceeding.

phases.name: Final Truth Gate
phases.principle: Is everything honest, verified, and consistent?

delegates.task_template: Final verification across docs, intent, architecture, performance, security, UX, and test evidence for: ${goal}
verifies: claims vs evidence across all gates

phases.checkpoint: Reviewer sign-off with evidence for all claims
phases.failure_message: Final truth gate failed. Nothing ships.

delegates.task_template: Verify UI accessibility, keyboard navigation, light/dark behavior, and interaction quality for: ${goal}
Verify memory, registry, and docs truth for: ${goal}
Verify documentation reflects actual behavior for: ${goal}
Verify full test coverage and quality gates for: ${goal}
Verify changelog, versioning, and release readiness for: ${goal}
